project.component: { "keyToString": { ".NET Launch Settings Profile.API: http.executor": "Run", ".NET Project.BlockchainTest.executor": "Run", ".NET Project.ClientTest.executor": "Run", ".NET Project.Node_01.executor": "Run", ".NET Project.TermiteUI.executor": "Run", ".NET Project.TermiteUIMVVP.executor": "Run", ".NET Project.TermiteUI_2.0.executor": "Run", ".NET Project.Test.executor": "Run", ".NET Project.TestStun.executor": "Run", "DefaultPlantUmlFileTemplate": "UML Sequence", "HTTP Request.API | #1.executor": "Run", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "feature/protocol-adaptation", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "preferences.pluginManager", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" }, "keyToStringList": { "com.intellij.ide.scratch.ScratchImplUtil$2/New Scratch File": [ "GitIgnore" ] } }

task.summary: Added IpHelper to get my local and external ip

Added the RequestSerializer class for dynamic deserialization of JSON into objects based on the message type. The class uses Reflection to find types that implement IRequest and maps them to the TerMessageType enumeration.
Adaptation of the system to the new protocol
Finished adapting the server to the new protocol
Adapted the client to the new protocol

MESSAGE.value: Added IpHelper to get my local and external ip

Added the RequestSerializer class for dynamic deserialization of JSON into objects based on the message type. The class uses Reflection to find types that implement IRequest and maps them to the TerMessageType enumeration.
Adaptation of the system to the new protocol
Finished adapting the server to the new protocol
Adapted the client to the new protocol
